label.purpose: Issue, photo, state, and navigation labels.

motion.name: projector-gate
motion.purpose: The first loaded photograph opens horizontally like a projector gate.

components.name: Entry Control
components.description: Projector-yellow action that advances from program context into the issue.
components.css: .ds-entry { display:flex; min-height:56px; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:12px 14px; color:#050A12; background:#FFD84A; font:700 13px/1.4 'Archivo Narrow',Arial Narrow,sans-serif; letter-spacing:.06em; text-decoration:none; } .ds-entry:hover { background:#F4F3ED; } .ds-entry:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #FFD84A; outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Primary Navigation
components.description: Three adjacent screening-program links with one active cue.
components.css: .ds-nav { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); border:1px solid rgba(145,166,202,.42); background:#081A40; } .ds-nav a { min-height:56px; display:grid; place-items:center; color:#F4F3ED; border-left:1px solid rgba(145,166,202,.42); font:600 13px/1.4 'Archivo Narrow',Arial Narrow,sans-serif; letter-spacing:.045em; text-decoration:none; } .ds-nav a:first-child { border-left:0; } .ds-nav a:hover,.ds-nav .ds-nav-active { color:#FFD84A; box-shadow:inset 0 -4px #FFD84A; } .ds-nav a:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #FFD84A; outline-offset:-3px; }

components.name: Program Panel
components.description: Opening context panel for the current screening.
components.html:
NOW SCREENING

THE ONES
I KEEP

A personal sequence of photographs.
components.css: .ds-program { width:320px; padding:28px; color:#F4F3ED; background:#081A40; border:1px solid rgba(145,166,202,.42); } .ds-cue { color:#91A6CA; font:600 12px/1.4 'Archivo Narrow',Arial Narrow,sans-serif; letter-spacing:.08em; } .ds-program h2 { margin:56px 0 28px; font:400 56px/.86 'Archivo Black',Arial Black,sans-serif; letter-spacing:-.04em; } .ds-program p { color:#91A6CA; font:400 15px/1.6 'Spline Sans',Arial,sans-serif; }

components.name: Photographic Frame
components.description: Square-edged black aperture that preserves the photograph's natural ratio.
components.css: .ds-frame { margin:0; color:#91A6CA; background:#081A40; font:600 12px/1.4 'Archivo Narrow',Arial Narrow,sans-serif; letter-spacing:.045em; } .ds-aperture { aspect-ratio:4/3; display:grid; place-items:center; color:#91A6CA; background:#050A12; border:1px solid rgba(145,166,202,.42); } .ds-frame figcaption { display:flex; gap:12px; padding-top:10px; border-top:1px solid rgba(145,166,202,.42); } .ds-frame strong { color:#FFD84A; } .ds-frame:focus-within { outline:3px solid #FFD84A; }

components.name: Current Issue Marker
components.description: Compact rectangular state label used only for the latest program.
components.css: .ds-latest { display:inline-block; padding:8px 11px; color:#050A12; background:#FFD84A; font:700 12px/1.4 'Archivo Narrow',Arial Narrow,sans-serif; letter-spacing:.05em; }

narrative.overview: PHOTO B behaves like a late repertory screening rather than a magazine or social feed. Photographs are projected frames; issues are programs; navigation is the quiet apparatus that controls the sequence.
keyCharacteristics: Drenched midnight-cobalt fields with one projector-yellow signal color.
Square, frame-like surfaces with no ornamental radius.
Condensed program typography for titles and calm grotesk text for reading.
Large photographic beats separated by compact issue notation.
Motion behaves like a projector gate: reveal, hold, advance.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Projector Yellow communicates selection, focus, or sequence; it is never scattered as decoration.

rules.name: The Program Rule
rules.body: Large display type states the current viewing context once; compact labels carry all repeated issue and image notation.

dos: Do let one photograph dominate the opening viewport.
Do use issue numbers and view position as functional wayfinding.
Do keep transition timing deliberate and reduced-motion safe.
Do preserve clear focus states and 44px mobile targets.
donts: Don't use warm cream paper, editorial serifs, or italic display accents.
Don't use rounded cards, pills, glass, glow borders, or decorative gradients.
Don't turn every label into uppercase microcopy; reserve it for program notation.
Don't crop photographs merely to regularize the grid.
